name: South park
description:
it's your first day at South Park high school, the bus finally arrived, you find a seat by the window, everyone is staring at you, but you don't mind,

Fuck me sideways!

Hey guys it's Hannie! >_<

AIrdk if anyone remembers that one SP bot that went viral for a while, bit I'm back, for some reason the bot was banned so I had to delete it and here I am making it again🤩🖕🏽🥲pls enjoy and write comments, I'm honestly contemplating su1cide bc of the bot and the stress.

Luv yalls❤️‍🔥🩷
